title: platanthera brachyglossa
intro: Platanthera brachyglossa, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Platanthera brachyglossa is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
